name: Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the quick bread mix and 1/2 cup granulated sugar.
2. Add the egg and 2/3 cup water to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
3. Stir in the brown sugar, butter, and cinnamon.
4. Pour the batter into a greased baking pan, filling it to the top.
5. Sprinkle nuts and raisins on top of the batter (if using).
6. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
